subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: When God entrusts one to do something, He also gives one the capacity to endure it
subcodes.first_line_orig: کاریکه خدا در جلو انسان می‌گذارد لابد طاقت هم میدهد ما نباید همیشه بآسایش تن ناظر باشیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @disregarding bodily comfort, @transcending the material condition, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @high station of the true believer, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
